THIS MATTER IS ALSO LINE NO. 11 on today's calendar. Counsel represented in open court that she spoke with opposing counsel Michael Mau who stated he had no opposition to a consolidation of this action with 319039 Phoenix Paint Co. vs. Diesel International. Based on her representations, the Court GRANTED the motion to consolidate. Order signed in open court. Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
